title: Superstep
description: Limited series of customized sneakers for the SuperStep retail chain. The models were designed for display spaces and customization zones in three cities: Moscow, Saint Petersburg, and Yekaterinburg. Each pair is an exclusive piece hand-painted by Street Wave artists, created to showcase the studio's capabilities and the brand's visual language.

details.task: Create a series of custom sneakers to decorate SuperStep custom zones and draw attention to the service inside the store.
details.solution: We created a series of 36 customized pairs of sneakers for SuperStep's flagship custom zones in Moscow, Saint Petersburg, and Yekaterinburg. Each piece was handcrafted and served as a demonstration of how sneaker customization can exist at the intersection of product, art, and retail environment.
details.result: The project strengthened the visual presence of custom zones inside the stores, attracted visitor attention, and turned the service display into a full-fledged art element of the space.
